assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all required notification types in the matrix table and detailed sections: security patches, end-of-support warnings, auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, plus additional relevant types

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns HIGH urgency to security patches and LOW urgency to new version available notifications, with clear color coding (red, yellow, green) and priority levels throughout

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly categorizes end-of-support warnings as HIGH priority requiring upgrade before EoS date, with detailed timeline-based actions for 30-day, 14-day, 7-day, and final warnings

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides specific checklist actions for auto-upgrade scheduled notifications including business impact checks, timing validation, on-call coverage, and maintenance window alignment

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'For critical CVEs: consider emergency upgrade outside window' and includes an emergency process section for bypassing maintenance windows for critical security issues

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes new version available as LOW priority 'Informational Only' with 'No immediate action' required, and states to note for planning purposes only

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response includes specific gcloud commands for setting up Pub/Sub notifications and Cloud Logging alerts, plus email filtering rules for automated triage

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'Review release notes for features/fixes of interest' under new version available actions and references GKE release schedule for proactive planning
